title: unicode character code shows in inspect a container or an image
body:
1. docker inspect an image looks good
```
# docker inspect docker.io/nginx | grep -i maintainer
                "maintainer": "NGINX Docker Maintainers <docker-maint@nginx.com>"
                "maintainer": "NGINX Docker Maintainers <docker-maint@nginx.com>"
```
2. ` \u003` and `\u003e` shows in buildah inspect, it occurs in more than one place, It could been seen in `Labels` and `created_by`.
```
# buildah inspect -t image nginx | grep -i maintainer
                "maintainer": "NGINX Docker Maintainers \u003cdocker-maint@nginx.com\u003e"
                "created_by": "/bin/sh -c #(nop)  LABEL maintainer=NGINX Docker Maintainers \u003cdocker-maint@nginx.com\u003e",
                "maintainer": "NGINX Docker Maintainers \u003cdocker-maint@nginx.com\u003e"
                "maintainer": "NGINX Docker Maintainers \u003cdocker-maint@nginx.com\u003e"
                "created_by": "/bin/sh -c #(nop)  LABEL maintainer=NGINX Docker Maintainers \u003cdocker-maint@nginx.com\u003e",
```

comments.body: `skopeo inspect` also has this problem, so it should be an issue in `container/image` library, once this issue is fixed, `skopeo inspect` should look good as well.
Thanks @gouyang. A fix was merged, please review it.
